files.Title: UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Consumers.UrlRedirectedEventConsumer
files.Summary: Consumes URL redirected events and updates URL redirect statistics.

files.Title: UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Controllers.AnalyticsController
files.Summary: Provides endpoints for reading URL redirect analytics.

files.Title: UrlShortener.AnalyticsService.Migrations.InitialAnalyticsCreate
files.Summary: A base class inherited by each EF Core migration.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Commands.Register.RegisterCommandHandler
files.Summary: Handles user registration commands. Checks email uniqueness, hashes the password, saves the user and generates a JWT token.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Queries.LoginQueryHandler
files.Summary: Handles user login queries. Validates user credentials and generates a JWT token.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ICacheService
files.Summary: Provides abstraction for cache operations. Application layer does not depend on a concrete cache provider.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IMessagePublisher
files.Summary: Provides abstraction for publishing integration events. Application layer does not depend on RabbitMQ or another concrete message broker.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPasswordHasher
files.Summary: Provides password hashing and verification functionality.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.UrlActions.IShortUrlBuilder
files.Summary: Builds a full short URL from a generated short code.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.UrlActions.IUrlCodeGenerator
files.Summary: Provides functionality for generating short URL codes.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Commands.ShortenUrlCommandHandler
files.Summary: Handles commands for creating short URLs. Uses database storage, Redis cache and RabbitMQ messaging.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Queries.RedirectQueries.RedirectQueryHandler
files.Summary: Handles redirect queries by short URL code. Uses Redis cache to speed up redirects and publishes redirect events for analytics.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Domain.Common.Entity<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for all domain entities. Provides a strongly typed identifier for each entity.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Domain.Common.ValueObject
files.Summary: Base class for value objects. Value objects are compared by their values instead of object references.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.Entity.Url
files.Summary: Represents a shortened URL in the domain model. Contains the original long URL, generated short code and creation date.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.ValueObjects.UrlId
files.Summary: Strongly typed identifier for the Url entity. Wraps a Guid value and provides value-based equality.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.Entity.User
files.Summary: Represents an application user. Stores user identity data and password hash.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Domain.UserAggregate.ValueObjects.UserId
files.Summary: Strongly typed identifier for the User entity. Wraps a Guid value and provides value-based equality.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Infrastructure.Migrations.AddValueObjectIds
files.Summary: A base class inherited by each EF Core migration.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Infrastructure.Services.CachingService
files.Summary: Redis implementation of the cache service. Uses IDistributedCache and JSON serialization for storing objects.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Infrastructure.Services.MassTransitMessagePublisher
files.Summary: Message publisher implementation based on MassTransit. Publishes integration events to RabbitMQ.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Messaging.Contracts.Events.UrlCreatedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event that is published when a new short URL is created. Used by notification service to send Telegram notifications.

files.Title: UrlShortener.Messaging.Contracts.Events.UrlRedirectedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event that is published when a short URL is redirected. Used by analytics service to update redirect statistics.

files.Title: UrlShortener.NotificationsService.Consumers.UrlCreatedEventConsumer
files.Summary: Consumes URL created events and sends Telegram notifications.
